creator: dglo@ssec.wisc.edu
text:
Update MySQL JDBC driver

Fix: The attached 'shar' file contains a MySQL JDBC driver
	which should work for both jdk1.1.8 and jdk1.2.2
	(I hope :-).

	Note that the '.include <bsd.port.mk>' in the Makefile
	is in the middle of the file rather than at the end,
	and it *needs* to be there because I need LOCALBASE
	expanded before I can check for the existence of
	the jdk1.2.2 stuff.  I'd be happy to learn of a more
	elegant way of doing this!
